violations.description: Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. - Floors in walk-in cooler & freezer in need of cleaning. - Reach in freezer and prep coolers collecting food debris on bottom shelves. In need of cleaning.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. - Kitchen utensils stored upright in buckets were not inverted. - Single use utensils near ice cream machine were not inverted.

Toilet facilities. — ---Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door.--Toilet room was not provided with sufficient mechanical ventilation. -Mechanical vent has thick layer of dust/buildup covering it. In need of cleaning. Might need to look into a different lightbulb in the vent also.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Attachments to walls and ceilings (e.g. light fixtures, vent covers, decorations etc..) were not cleanable and/or maintained in good repair. - Vent covers above soda machine in need of cleaning.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
